series_metadata.series_description: This record series may include but not limited to; correspondence, letters, graders, scoring sheets, grant applications, original grant, and approval notifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for three (3) years after the grant has closed; provided the Federal audit is closed without discrepancy. ; Paper: Retain for three (3) years after the grant has closed; provided the Federal audit is closed without discrepancy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
